topicIdsAndObjectNames.title: List of Topic IDs and Object Names
topicIdsAndObjectNames.description: A list of pairs from the engagement topics of the object ID (from the TopicId field) and its object name for the current messaging session. For example, [{TopicId: "08pRZ0000008iPeYAI", ObjectName: "ServiceAppointment"}, {TopicId: "02iRZ0000006AeDYAU", ObjectName: "Asset"}].
